title: hieracium ucenicum subsp. arvasicum
intro: Hieracium ucenicum subsp. arvasicum, also known as Hieracium arvasicum, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family, Asteraceae. It is a perennial herb native to Europe and Western Asia, known for its medicinal properties and potential health benefits. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various ailments, including digestive issues and skin problems, due to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. Herbal preparations of Hieracium ucenicum subsp. arvasicum can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and may be used topically or internally to support overall health and well-being.
